zh.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Coolidge II於大約1630年出生在英國時，他的父親John Coolidge27歲，母親Mary Ravens29歲。他於1655年2月14日與Hannah Livermore在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1691年2月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Coolidge II于大约1630年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Coolidge27岁，母亲Mary Ravens29岁。他于1655年2月14日与Hannah Livermore在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1691年2月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Coolidge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably an occupational name for acollege servant or someone with some other association with auniversity college, for example a tenant farmer who farmed one of themany farms in England known as College Farm, most of which are or wereowned by university colleges.

variants.name: Colledge
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): habitational name from Colwich in Staffordshire, named from Old English col ‘(char)coal’ + wīc ‘building’. The name has become associated with the familiar word college.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Coolidge II was born about 1630, in England, his father, John Coolidge, was 27 and his mother, Mary Ravens, was 29. He married Hannah Livermore on 14 February 1655, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 8 February 1691, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Coolidge II est né environ 1630, à Angleterre, son père, John Coolidge, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Ravens, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Livermore le 14 février 1655, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1691, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Coolidge II um 1630 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Coolidge 27 und seine Mutter Mary Ravens 29. Er hat am 14. Februar 1655 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Livermore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1691 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Coolidge II è nato il circa 1630 nel England, il suo padre, John Coolidge, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Ravens, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Livermore il 14 febbraio 1655, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1691, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Coolidge IIが約1630年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Coolidgeは27歳，母Mary Ravensは29歳であった。1655年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでHannah Livermoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1691年2月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: John Coolidge II(이)가 대략 1630년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Coolidge(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ravens(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1655년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Hannah Livermore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1691년 2월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Coolidge II nasceu aproximadamente 1630, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Coolidge, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ravens, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Livermore em 14 de fevereiro de 1655, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1691, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Coolidge II родился около 1630 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Coolidge было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ravens, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Livermore 14 февраля 1655 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 8 февраля 1691 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Coolidge II nació aproximadamente 1630, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Coolidge, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Ravens, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Hannah Livermore el 14 de febrero de 1655, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1691, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
